name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Ophidia GG Small Shoulder Bag. The Ophidia collection for the 2024 Pre-Fall season features shoulder bags, totes, and handbags crafted from GG black denim, cleverly incorporating silver-tone metal hardware to create a playful contrast. Black and grey GG denim, silver-tone hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, double G, double G pendant zipper pull, interior open pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (44cm high). Crossbody wear. Zipper closure, weight: approx. 0.39kg.

Made in Italy
